title: Task.plan — planning step array element shape
description: JSON Schema for a single element in the Task.plan JSONB array (src/shared/infrastructure/database/models/operations.py). Task.plan holds the ordered sequence of planning steps produced by the INTERPRET phase for a given task. The structure is implicit in the current codebase — no writer in src/ has been identified that populates this column with a stable schema. This contract documents the minimal observable shape and is intended for future enforcement once the plan authoring path is stabilized. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 2 (persistence boundary). This file uses the .schema.json suffix and is intentionally skipped by intent_validator.py.

step_number.description: Ordinal position of this step in the plan sequence, 1-based.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this step accomplishes.

action.description: Action identifier or operation to perform in this step.

target.description: Target file, symbol, or resource this step operates on. Optional.

rationale.description: Why this step is included in the plan.

requires_approval.description: Whether this step requires human confirmation before execution. Default false.

estimated_complexity.description: Estimated implementation complexity score for this step.
